name: Submit to antiSMASH
description: Submits a DNA sequence to the public antiSMASH API to analyze polyketide synthase (PKS) domains.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: The synthetic DNA sequence to analyze. Can be a raw string or resource name.

outputs.description: A message containing the antiSMASH job ID to be used for checking status.

output.result: Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: test-job-123...
